title: There is a person who feels your pain deeply for you even though you don't and won't and can't feel it for yourself
author: joshualinog
excerpt: # There is a person who feels your pain deeply for you even though you don't and won't and can't feel it for yourself these are words to use in evangelizing someone. Specifically if you are talking to
body:
# There is a person who feels your pain deeply for you even though you don't and won't and can't feel it for yourself
these are words to use in evangelizing someone. Specifically if you are talking to someone who is apathetic or numb.
